⛽ Iran threatens Gulf energy infrastructure (Saudi, UAE) retaliation for South Pars gas field strike

🩸 Israel kills 11 in western Iran (Dorud, Chegeni) + Intelligence Minister Khatib + Larijani
🚢 Hormuz traffic nearly doubled — countries cutting individual deals bypassing US coalition

📞 Putin-Trump call TODAY on Ukraine — Lavrov pre-rejects territorial concessions
🛢️ Oil ~$108-110/barrel — markets in 'panic mode', shares fall, energy prices surge
💥 Explosive drones strike near US Embassy in Baghdad — Green Zone under repeated attack

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: SIGNAL: Iran easing Hormuz restrictions per maritime data — countries cutting individual deals instead of joining US coalition. This is a partial de-escalation on the economic front, though military strikes continue. Europe refuses Hormuz naval deployment. Putin-Trump call today is the key diplomatic variable for Ukraine. Zero ceasefire signals in ME active theaters.

latest_news.headline: Iran threatens Gulf energy targets after South Pars gas field struck
latest_news.text: IRGC warns Saudi Arabia, UAE, and Gulf states it will attack energy infrastructure in retaliation for Israeli strike on South Pars gas field (world's largest). First targeted attack on Iran's fossil fuel production since war began.

latest_news.headline: IRGC claims 100+ Israeli military targets hit in revenge barrage
latest_news.text: IRGC says missiles hit 100+ military and security targets in Israeli territory as revenge for Larijani killing. Combined drone and missile attack on Tel Aviv and central Israel.

latest_news.headline: Explosive drones hit near US Embassy in Baghdad
latest_news.text: Iran launches explosive drones at US Embassy Baghdad — sirens triggered, explosion heard near diplomatic compound. Third drone incident near embassy this week.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan 5-day Eid ceasefire begins tonight
latest_news.text: Both sides announce 5-day pause (Mar 18-23) for Eid al-Fitr, mediated by Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Turkey. Pakistan warns operations resume 'with renewed intensity' if attacked. First bilateral de-escalation since conflict began.

latest_news.headline: Oil prices surge, markets in 'panic mode' as Iran-Gulf escalation widens
latest_news.text: Brent crude sustained above $100/barrel. Markets in 'panic mode' — shares fall globally as Iran threatens Gulf energy infrastructure. Heightened risks to global economy acknowledged by central bankers.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 24, 19:04 UTC) — (1) IRGC claims 100+ Israeli targets hit in revenge for Larijani; (2) Iran threatens Gulf energy infrastructure retaliation for South Pars strike; (3) Explosive drones near US Embassy Baghdad; (4) Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire starts tonight — first pause in weeks; (5) Putin-Trump call today on Ukraine — diplomatic variable; (6) Oil ~$108-110, markets in panic mode; (7) Hormuz traffic doubling — countries bypassing US coalition with individual Iran deals. Military escalation continues with no ceasefire signals in active ME theaters.
